name: brain-memory
description: Persistent, neuroscience-inspired memory for GitHub Copilot CLI. A sessionStart hook injects a budget-bounded context payload (pinned facts, relevant memories, procedural skills index) from the user's global ~/.brain; a sessionEnd hook records session boundaries for context-dependent recall; bundled agent skills teach Copilot deterministic recall (brain-remember), classified storage (brain-memorize), and a health dashboard (brain-status). Requires the brain CLI: npm install -g brain-memory.
